label: 1241 to 1243 Repealed. , ,Pub. L. 85–861, § 36A72 Stat. 1569Sept. 2, 1958
notes: Section 1241, , , provided for promotion to first lieutenant. See section 14301 et seq. of Title 10, Armed Forces.act Sept. 3, 1954, ch. 1257, title III, § 31668 Stat. 1159

Section 1242, , , provided for promotion to captain, major, lieutenant colonel, and colonel to fill unit vacancies. See section 14301 et seq. of Title 10.act Sept. 3, 1954, ch. 1257, title III, § 31768 Stat. 1159
Section 1243, , , provided for promotion to brigadier general and major general to fill vacancies. See .act Sept. 3, 1954, ch. 1257, title III, § 31868 Stat. 1159section 14315 of Title 10
